message:
fix(lab): empty CaptureManifest is not fully_observed

CaptureManifest::fully_observed() returned true for an empty manifest
because all() on an empty iterator is vacuously true. An empty manifest
means no fields were captured at all, which is the opposite of fully
observed.

Add !self.annotations.is_empty() guard. Test added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
